description: Open redirect vulnerability in the Global Redirect module 6.x-1.x before 6.x-1.4 and 7.x-1.x before 7.x-1.4 for Drupal, when non-clean to clean is enabled, allows remote attackers to redirect users to arbitrary web sites and conduct phishing attacks via a URL in the q parameter.
